shadows.name: overlay-separation
shadows.purpose: Temporary detail sheets and menus only.

motion.name: state-change
motion.purpose: Hover, focus, theme, and disclosure transitions.

narrative.overview: Mimir reconstructs agent work after the fact. The system is technical, quiet, exact, and organized around sessions rather than generic activity analytics.

rules.name: The One Signal Rule
rules.body: Teal communicates interaction or current state only.

rules.name: The Evidence Mono Rule
rules.body: Use monospace only for character-level evidence.

rules.name: The Flat Record Rule
rules.body: Persistent information sits on one plane.

dos: Do make Sessions the default arrival route.
Do use rules, alignment, and compact spacing for hierarchy.
donts: Don't resemble a generic SaaS dashboard.
Don't make the activity table the center of Mimir.
Don't use teal for decoration or surface blending.
